features.description: Coaching profile catalogue + lifecycle. Master feature; when off, coaching workflows disabled.
Medium+. Enables the full certification workflow with admin verification + document upload. Small ships a simplified text-only cert ledger.
Medium+. Enables the per-Coach per-Sport/Discipline/Position rating system. Feeds athlete↔coach match-making.
Medium+. Allows a coach to hold assignments at branches other than their primary branch. Small tier limits assignments to the coach's home branch only.
Medium+. Exposes verified + is_accepting_new_athletes=true coaches on the customer-facing site + booking flow.
Enterprise-only. Extends coaching-record retention from 7 to 10 years + rating retention from 2 to 5 years. Legal-hold-friendly for regulated tenants.
